channel.title: Drake Interplanetary Comm-Link
channel.description: Official transmissions, engineering updates, and fleet operations news from Drake Interplanetary.

item.title: CUTLASS BLACK: COMBAT SYSTEMS UPGRADE v2.4
item.description: Our engineering team has finalized the combat systems upgrade for the Cutlass Black. The v2.4 update brings enhanced targeting algorithms, improved ballistic synchronization, and a new threat assessment module for the onboard computer.

item.title: DRAKE Q1 2026 PRODUCTION REPORT
item.description: Drake Interplanetary reports a record production quarter. Vessel output increased by 18% across all manufacturing facilities in the Stanton system, driven by growing demand for the Corsair and Vulture models.

item.title: CORSAIR CARGO OPERATIONS: A VISUAL GUIDE
item.description: Our fleet operations team has produced a comprehensive video tutorial on maximizing cargo efficiency with the Corsair Heavy Cargo. From loading procedures to jump point navigation, this guide covers every aspect.

item.title: VULTURE SALVAGE ARM: SOFTWARE UPDATE 1.9.2
item.description: The latest software update for the Vulture's salvage arm system brings improved precision targeting, a new auto-sort module for recovered materials, and better integration with the onboard cargo management system.

item.title: MESSAGE FROM DRAKE CEO: EXPANSION INTO NEW SYSTEMS
item.description: Drake Interplanetary is proud to announce the expansion of our operations into new territories. New service centers, parts depots, and sales offices will be operational by end of Q2 2026.

item.title: DRAGONFLY ALL-TERRAIN REVIEW: MICROTECH TRIALS
item.description: Our test team put the Dragonfly through rigorous trials on frozen tundra and volcanic zones. The results confirm what Drake has always known — the Dragonfly outperforms in extreme conditions where others fail completely.

item.title: HERALD DATA VAULT: NEW ENCRYPTION STANDARD
item.description: Drake's data security team has integrated the new military-certified Quantum Encryption Standard into all Herald units manufactured from January 2026 onwards. Existing owners can visit any service center for the retrofit.

item.title: DRAKE JOINS STANTON INDUSTRIAL COALITION
item.description: Drake Interplanetary has officially joined the Stanton Industrial Coalition, a new alliance of industrial manufacturers committed to sustainable practices and worker safety standards throughout the system.

item.title: INSIDE DRAKE: ENGINEERING TEAM SPOTLIGHT
item.description: Go behind the scenes at Drake's Port Olisar engineering facility. Meet the team responsible for the rugged, reliable vessels trusted by thousands of operators across the verse.

item.title: BUCCANEER PERFORMANCE ANALYSIS: COMBAT REPORT
item.description: An independent performance analysis of the Buccaneer light fighter confirms superior speed and agility metrics compared to similar class vessels. Full ballistic performance data and flight model comparisons included.

item.title: DRAKE CUSTOMER SUPPORT: 24/7 COVERAGE EXPANSION
item.description: Drake Interplanetary is expanding its customer support operations to provide true 24/7 coverage across all time zones. New support centers in three additional locations will reduce average response times by 40%.

item.title: PORT OLISAR SERVICE CENTER: GRAND REOPENING
item.description: After extensive renovations, the Drake Interplanetary service center at Port Olisar Station has officially reopened. The expanded facility features 24 service bays, a parts warehouse, and a dedicated Vulture maintenance suite.
